sections.paragraph:
Original: עד עוד

Transliteration: ‛ôd ‛ôd

Phonetic: ode

BDB Definition:

  1. a going round, continuance (substantive)
  2. still, yet, again, besides (adverb)
    1. still, yet (of continuance or persistence)
    2. still, yet, more (of addition or repetition)
    3. again
    4. still, moreover, besides

Origin: from H5749

TWOT entry: 1576a

Part(s) of speech:
